NVDA.robotnik_notes: The gravitational centre of the frontier stack. NVIDIA's compute silicon enables robotics inference, satellite processing, and autonomous systems. CoWoS packaging capacity is the binding constraint.

TSM.robotnik_notes: Single most critical node in the frontier stack. Manufactures >90% of advanced logic chips. $165B US investment reshapes geographic risk but creates new Materials demand.

AVGO.robotnik_notes: Custom ASIC business with 3 major hyperscaler customers diversifies AI compute beyond GPUs. VMware acquisition adds software layer.

ASML.robotnik_notes: Sole supplier of EUV lithography — the most critical single-source dependency in the entire frontier stack. No alternative exists. Record EUR 13.2B order backlog.

MU.robotnik_notes: HBM memory capacity gates AI accelerator production. Revenue tripled to $23.9B on HBM demand. HBM4 in development.

AMD.robotnik_notes: MI300X validates multi-vendor AI accelerator demand. Data Center segment exceeded $14B, broadening compute supply for robotics.

LRCX.robotnik_notes: Etch and deposition equipment essential for advanced node manufacturing. Benefits from every fab expansion globally.

AMAT.robotnik_notes: Gate-all-around and advanced packaging equipment driving growth. Essential for next-gen AI chips for robotics applications.

INTC.robotnik_notes: Foundry pivot critical for US semiconductor sovereignty. 18A customer wins validate CHIPS Act thesis. If IFS succeeds, reduces Taiwan concentration.

KLAC.robotnik_notes: Process control and metrology — defect inspection critical for sub-3nm yield management. Benefits from increasing process complexity.

SIE GR.robotnik_notes: Factory automation backbone. Siemens EDA + industrial automation spans the full stack from chip design to factory floor.

ISRG.robotnik_notes: $8.9B revenue, 20M procedures. da Vinci 5 platform. Razor-and-blade model template for robotics commercialisation. 57% recurring revenue.

SU FP.robotnik_notes: Factory and data centre power infrastructure. Enables both semiconductor fab operation and robot deployment environments.

ABBN SW.robotnik_notes: Big Four robot manufacturer. NVIDIA Omniverse integration for digital twin robot programming. Key player in industrial automation.

2308 TT.robotnik_notes: Servo drives and power electronics supplier. Critical motion control layer between semiconductor chips and robot actuators.

6861 JP.robotnik_notes: Factory automation bellwether with 50%+ margins. Machine vision sensors are the eyes of every automated production line.

EMR.robotnik_notes: Process automation for materials sector. Emerson systems control the chemical plants that produce semiconductor materials.

6503 JP.robotnik_notes: Cross-sector: robots + power semiconductors + satellite components. One of few entities spanning all four Robotnik sectors.

ROK.robotnik_notes: North American factory automation standard. Connects semiconductor fab equipment with robotic manufacturing systems.

6954 JP.key_suppliers: Servo motor components, rare earth magnets
6954 JP.robotnik_notes: World's largest robot manufacturer (1M+ deployed). $90M Michigan expansion aligns with CHIPS Act reshoring. Rare earth magnet dependency.

LMT.robotnik_notes: Largest absolute space revenue ($13B/yr). Artemis programme prime. Defence primes provide the institutional demand baseline for the space economy.

NOC.robotnik_notes: Space Systems at 24.3% of revenue. Solid rocket motors, MEV in-orbit servicing, B-21 programme.

LHX.robotnik_notes: Satellite sensor payloads and space domain awareness. SAS segment at 31.6%. Segment reorganisation may improve visibility.

012450 KS.robotnik_notes: Korean space ambition. Bridges robotics (Hanwha Group industrial automation) and space (launch vehicle development).

HEI.robotnik_notes: Hidden champion — niche sole-sourced space and defence parts. Programmatically critical: individual programmes depend on HEICO's specific components.

RKLB.robotnik_notes: Purest New Space play. Vertically integrated: Electron launch + Space Systems + Neutron in development. Revenue $436M (+55% YoY). Dual revenue model.

SATS.robotnik_notes: Legacy GEO operator navigating LEO era. Hughes broadband business transitioning.

ASTS.robotnik_notes: Direct-to-cell satellite connectivity. $1.5B+ in MOU commitments. Pre-revenue but creating a new space infrastructure category. Most semiconductor-intensive satellite design.

PL.robotnik_notes: Largest EO constellation (~200 satellites). Daily global imaging. Semiconductor content per satellite rising with onboard AI processing.

KRMN.robotnik_notes: Precision space component consolidator. Roll-up strategy acquiring niche sole-sourced parts suppliers.

LIN.robotnik_notes: World's largest gas company. Ultra-pure neon for EUV lithography is a critical dependency. Electronics segment growing on fab expansion.

AI FP.robotnik_notes: #2 gas company. European launch propellant supply + fab gases. Dual frontier stack exposure.

APD.robotnik_notes: #3 gas company. Electronics gases for fabs + clean hydrogen for space launch propulsion.

MRK GR.robotnik_notes: EUV photoresist chokepoint. Big 3 photoresist supplier. Japanese suppliers dominate but Merck is the European anchor.

BAS GR.robotnik_notes: Broadest chemical company. Battery materials division + semiconductor chemicals. Entry point to the materials layer.

3037 TT.robotnik_notes: CoWoS substrate bottleneck — Q1 star (+130.6%). Advanced packaging substrates are the binding constraint on AI chip production. Sole supplier risk.

600111 C1.robotnik_notes: Geopolitical chokepoint. China's largest rare earth producer. Controls NdFeB magnet precursors essential for every servo motor in every robot.

SQM.robotnik_notes: #2 lithium producer. Atacama brine = lowest-cost lithium source. Battery supply chain for robotics, drones, satellite power.

6971 JP.robotnik_notes: Advanced ceramics for IC packages, robot joints, and precision components. Dual semiconductor + robotics exposure.

ALB.robotnik_notes: #1 lithium producer. Geographic diversification (Australia, Chile, US). Battery supply chain for frontier stack mobile systems.
